toolkit_findings: CRITICAL: sector bypasses cso-toolkit entirely. The script uses raw write.csv() to write directly into Teams RAW data directory at 011_rawdata/dw_mnch_aggregates.csv — this mixes derived output with canonical raw inputs. Reviewer-mode mode-lock cannot engage when sector code does not call dw_save.
blockers_for_dbm: Refactor 01_aggregate.R:128 from `write.csv(aggregate_export, file.path(teamsRawData, 'dw_mnch_aggregates.csv'), ...)` to `dw_save(aggregate_export, file.path(dwWrkData, '_local', 'mnch', 'output', 'dw_mnch_aggregates.csv'), sector = 'mnch')`. Sector lead must adopt the dw_io contract.
